items.example: In my opinion, you need to be well-prepared for any interview.
I'd have to say that teamwork is the most important skill.

items.phrase: One thing I'd like to say is...
items.translation: Одна вещь, которую я хотел бы сказать...
items.example: One thing I'd like to say is that online courses are more difficult.

items.phrase: For me the most important thing is...
items.example: For me the most important thing is to enjoy what I do.
Can I ask a question? Sure, go ahead.
So you live at 106 West Smith Road? That's right.
I couldn't come because I was ill. I see.
